required_skills: Technical Architecture Understanding and System Design Literacy
API Product Design and Developer Experience (DX)
Agile and Scrum Methodology for Engineering Teams
Data Modeling and Database Schema Comprehension
Product Roadmap Planning for Platform and Infrastructure Products
Cross-functional Engineering Collaboration and Technical Trade-off Analysis
Performance, Scalability, and Reliability Requirements Definition
preferred_skills: Familiarity with machine learning model deployment and MLOps
Experience with data pipeline or ETL product ownership
Security and compliance requirements management (SOC 2, GDPR)
Developer tools or SDK product ownership
Microservices and event-driven architecture product design
Experience with GraphQL or REST API versioning strategies
Knowledge of observability tools and SRE practices
responsibilities: Own the roadmap for platform, API, or infrastructure products, balancing developer experience with internal engineering priorities and business outcomes
Translate complex business requirements into detailed technical specifications, architecture decision records (ADRs), and engineering-ready user stories
Collaborate closely with software architects and engineering leads to evaluate technical trade-offs, system design options, and build-vs-buy decisions
Define and maintain API contracts, developer documentation, and integration guides to ensure seamless third-party and internal developer adoption
Establish and monitor non-functional requirements including system latency, uptime SLAs, throughput targets, and security compliance standards
Lead sprint planning, technical backlog refinement, and estimation sessions, ensuring engineering velocity is maximized and scope is clearly bounded
Partner with DevOps and SRE teams to define release processes, deployment strategies, and rollback procedures for high-availability systems
Drive adoption of internal platform capabilities by evangelizing APIs and tooling to internal engineering teams and external developer communities
Analyze system performance metrics, error rates, and infrastructure costs using observability tools to identify optimization opportunities
Manage technical debt prioritization alongside feature development, negotiating trade-offs with engineering and business stakeholders transparently
